product_basic_kyc.product_name: Tatsya White Marble Bath Set with Intricate Jali Carving – Luxury Bathroom Accessory
product_basic_kyc.target_audience: Urban Indian homeowners, luxury hotel & guest house owners, and premium gift buyers
product_basic_kyc.primary_use_case: Premium bathroom accessory set for hand soap and toothbrush holder
secondary_use_cases: Gift item for weddings and housewarmings
product_basic_kyc.occasion_based_usage: Ideal for gifting during Indian festivals like Diwali, weddings, housewarming ceremonies, and special celebrations

indian_context_product_theme.cultural_relevance: White marble holds cultural significance in India for purity and luxury; Jali carving is a traditional Indian art reflecting heritage craftsmanship
indian_context_product_theme.how_indian_customer_uses_product: Used daily in home bathrooms for hygiene and aesthetic enhancement; also placed in guest bathrooms to impress visitors; suitable for enhancing luxury hotel bathroom decor
indian_context_product_theme.lifestyle_theme: Blending traditional Indian artistry with modern luxury lifestyle; promotes elegance and functionality in everyday bathroom routines
indian_context_product_theme.emotional_practical_value: Evokes pride in Indian craftsmanship and adds a premium touch that appeals to the discerning Indian buyer valuing heritage and style

amazon_listing_strategy.ideal_amazon_title: Tatsya White Marble Bath Set with Jali Carving - Elegant Soap Dispenser & Toothbrush Holder for Premium Bathroom Decor
bullet_points: Authentic White Marble – Durable and naturally elegant material sourced for premium Indian bathrooms
Traditional Jali Carving – Exquisite craftsmanship reflecting Indian heritage for a decorative and unique look
Complete Bath Set – Includes soap dispenser and toothbrush holder with matching tray for organized bathroom counters
Ideal Gift Choice – Perfect for weddings, festivals, and housewarming gifts with a touch of Indian luxury
Easy to Clean & Maintain – Smooth marble surface ensures effortless hygiene and lasting shine
amazon_listing_strategy.short_product_description: Elevate your bathroom with the Tatsya White Marble Bath Set featuring intricate Jali carving. This elegant set includes a soap dispenser and toothbrush holder on a matching tray, crafted to bring Indian tradition and luxury into your daily routine. Perfect for gifting or personal use, it blends beauty with practicality.
a_plus_content_section_ideas: Detailed close-up visuals of the Jali carving pattern highlighting craftsmanship
Lifestyle images showing the set in modern Indian bathrooms with marble and wooden decor
Infographics explaining the benefits of white marble and traditional design
Comparison module showcasing Tatsya’s superiority in design and material quality over competitors
Gift and occasion usage module with festive and wedding styling suggestions

Side profile with pump lever visible

Festive setup with subtle Indian decor accents
Bright natural light with wooden or cream tones

Daily hygiene routine setting in urban Indian homes
Guest bathroom showcase with premium finishing
Minimalist yet traditional Indian bathroom decor

requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.amazon_a_plus_look: Clean, minimalistic, premium and elegant with spacious layout and emphasis on craftsmanship and quality
